---
title: "Shiny Gallery"
---

This Shiny app serves as a home-page gallery for all Shiny apps hosted under `/srv/shiny`.

## How it works

The gallery scans `SHINY_BASE_DIR` (default: `/srv/shiny`) at startup and every 60 seconds thereafter, detecting any subdirectory that contains an `app.R` or `server.R` file.

## Customising an app's card

Create an `app-info.yml` file inside your app's directory to control how it appears in the gallery:

```yaml
title: "My Awesome App"
description: "A short description shown on the card."
icon: "chart-bar"   # Any Font Awesome 6 icon name (without the fa- prefix)
tags:
  - ecology
  - visualization
```

All fields are optional. If omitted, the gallery falls back to the folder name.

## Configuration

Set these environment variables on the server to override defaults:

| Variable | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `SHINY_BASE_DIR` | `/srv/shiny` | Directory to scan for apps |
| `SHINY_BASE_URL` | `/` | Base URL path prepended to app links |

## Deployment

Clone this repository into `/srv/shiny/gallery` (or wherever you want it served), then
point your Shiny Server config at it:

```nginx
location / {
  app_dir /srv/shiny/gallery;
  log_dir /var/log/shiny-server;
}
```
